title: Systems and methods for route planning
abstract: Systems and methods for route planning are provided. The systems may perform the methods to receive information of a first travel from the client terminal via a network. The systems may also perform the methods to generate at least one route planning record based on the information of the first travel. The at least one route planning record may include at least one public transportation travel route (402). The systems may also perform the methods to receive a request of a user for obtaining one of the at least one public transportation travel route, and transmit one of the at least one route planning record in response to the received request to the client terminal via the network (404).
